About Me

I build scalable web systems with Laravel, Livewire, and PHP/MySQL. My work includes real-time clinic management systems, queue platforms, and financial audit tools.

Beyond development, I also design websites—you can see my web design work on Behance.

Currently completing my M.Sc. in Web Science, researching intelligent systems for healthcare.
